V-216.notes: Confirmed via source review that whitelabel tenant detection in this build is strictly Host-header based (middleware.ts reads request.headers.get('host') and matches against a static WHITELABEL_DOMAINS list; localhost is explicitly excluded from tenant-domain matching). There is no ?tenant= query param, path param, or subdomain-of-localhost mechanism in the code — the project's own E2E suite fakes this by rewriting the host header at the network-interception layer, which a real browser cannot do via URL alone. Live-probed http://localhost:3006/?tenant=optimism to be sure: the query param is silently ignored and the default Karma tenant renders (title, nav, footer all default branding). No staging whitelabel tenant domain (e.g. app.opgrants.io) points at this local build, so that path is also unreachable. Verdict is BLOCKED per the check's expected-outcome instruction, with the exact reason: whitelabel resolution requires a tenant Host header, which cannot be set against this build via a real browser without a hosts-file/DNS override — no local override mechanism is documented or exists in source.
